sentences.target: Je rachète du café en sortant.

translations.fr: Je rachète du café en sortant.
translations.en: I’m buying more coffee on my way out.
translations.de: Ich besorge beim Rausgehen noch Kaffee.
translations.yue: 我出門嗰陣會買多啲咖啡。
translations.ru: Я по дороге куплю ещё кофе.
translations.pt: Vou comprar mais café ao sair.
translations.he: אני אקנה עוד קפה כשאני יוצא.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ mua thêm cà phê khi đi ra ngoài.
translations.ar: سأشتري المزيد من القهوة عند خروجي.
translations.nl: Ik haal nog wat koffie als ik wegga.
translations.hi: मैं बाहर जाते हुए थोड़ा और कॉफ़ी खरीदूँगा.
translations.el: Βγαίνοντας θα αγοράσω κι άλλο καφέ.
translations.nb: Jeg kjøper mer kaffe på vei ut.
translations.id: Aku akan beli lagi kopi saat keluar.
translations.sv: Jag köper mer kaffe på vägen ut.
translations.ro: Cumpăr mai multă cafea când ies.
translations.da: Jeg køber mere kaffe på vej ud.
translations.ja: 出るついでにコーヒーを買い足す。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the speaker as the subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the action of buying again/back.
Partitive article (contraction of de + le) introducing an unspecified quantity of a mass noun.
Common noun functioning as the direct object; the thing being bought.
Preposition introducing a present participle to form a gerundive phrase (adverbial modifier).
Present participle used in the gerund construction “en sortant”; functions adverbially (‘while leaving’).

sentences.target: Il faut racheter du papier toilette.

translations.fr: Il faut racheter du papier toilette.
translations.en: We need to buy more toilet paper.
translations.es: Hay que comprar más papel higiénico.
translations.tr: Daha fazla tuvalet kâğıdı almamız gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần mua thêm giấy vệ sinh.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى شراء المزيد من ورق المرحاض.
translations.hi: हमें और टॉयलेट पेपर खरीदना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αγοράσουμε κι άλλο χαρτί υγείας.
translations.id: Kita perlu beli lagi tisu toilet.
translations.ro: Trebuie să cumpărăm mai multă hârtie igienică.
translations.ja: トイレットペーパーを買い足さないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used with ‘falloir’ to express necessity.
Impersonal verb ‘falloir’, present indicative 3rd person singular; expresses necessity (‘il faut’).
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of ‘faut’; denotes the required action.
Partitive article introducing an unspecified quantity of a noun.
Noun serving as the head of the compound ‘papier toilette’; direct object of ‘racheter’.
Noun modifying ‘papier’ to form the compound ‘papier toilette’ (‘toilet paper’).

sentences.target: Tu rachètes du riz en rentrant.

translations.fr: Tu rachètes du riz en rentrant.
translations.en: Can you pick up rice on your way home.
translations.es: Compra arroz de camino a casa.
translations.de: Bring auf dem Heimweg Reis mit.
translations.it: Prendi del riso tornando a casa.
translations.ko: 집에 돌아오는 길에 쌀 좀 사와.
translations.pt: Compra arroz no caminho de volta para casa.
translations.vi: Mua gạo trên đường về nhà.
translations.ar: في طريقك إلى البيت اشترِ أرزًا.
translations.nl: Koop op weg naar huis rijst.
translations.hi: घर जाते समय थोड़ा चावल खरीद लेना.
translations.pl: Kup po drodze do domu ryż.
translations.el: Στον δρόμο για το σπίτι πάρε ρύζι.
translations.ro: Cumpără orez pe drum spre casă.
translations.ja: 帰り道にお米を買ってきて。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Partitive article introducing an unspecified quantity.
Common noun functioning as the direct object.
Preposition introducing a present participle to form a gerundive phrase.
Present participle used in the gerund construction “en rentrant”; functions adverbially (‘while returning’).

sentences.target: Nous rachetons la vieille console ensemble.

translations.fr: Nous rachetons la vieille console ensemble.
translations.en: We’re buying back the old console together.
translations.es: Volvemos a comprar la consola vieja juntos.
translations.de: Wir kaufen die alte Konsole gemeinsam zurück.
translations.ko: 우리는 그 오래된 콘솔을 함께 다시 사고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们一起把那台旧主机买回来。
translations.yue: 我哋一齊買返嗰部舊機。
translations.pt: Estamos comprando de volta o console antigo juntos.
translations.he: אנחנו קונים יחד את הקונסולה הישנה בחזרה.
translations.tr: Eski konsolu birlikte geri satın alıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cùng nhau mua lại chiếc máy chơi game cũ.
translations.ar: نشتري وحدة التحكم القديمة مرة أخرى معًا.
translations.nl: We kopen de oude console sammen terug.
translations.hi: हम मिलकर पुरानी कंसोल वापस खरीद रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper den gamle konsollen tilbake sammen.
translations.id: Kita bersama-sama membeli kembali konsol lama.
translations.sv: Vi köper tillbaka den gamla konsolen tillsammans.
translations.da: Vi køber den gamle konsol tilbage sammen.
translations.ja: 古いゲーム機を一緒に買い戻している。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing a specific noun.
Adjective, feminine singular, modifying ‘console’.
Common noun functioning as the direct object.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates joint action.

jp: Je rachète du café en sortant.
Il faut racheter du papier toilette.
Tu rachètes du riz en rentrant.
Nous rachetons la vieille console ensemble.
fr: Je rachète du café en sortant.
Il faut racheter du papier toilette.
Tu rachètes du riz en rentrant.
Nous rachetons la vieille console ensemble.
en: I’m buying more coffee on my way out.
We need to buy more toilet paper.
Can you pick up rice on your way home.
We’re buying back the old console together.
